package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/xml"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for yaml_unmarshal_untrusted_input: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `yaml.Unmarshal(untrustedInput, &target)` using `gopkg.in/yaml.v2` without size limits
type CaseYamlUnmarshalUntrustedInputDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseYamlUnmarshalUntrustedInputModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseYamlUnmarshalUntrustedInputRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseYamlUnmarshalUntrustedInputModel
}

type CaseYamlUnmarshalUntrustedInputService struct {
    repo *CaseYamlUnmarshalUntrustedInputRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseYamlUnmarshalUntrustedInputAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeYamlUnmarshalUntrustedInput(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseYamlUnmarshalUntrustedInputDTO) error {
    focus := "yaml_unmarshal_untrusted_input"
    _ = focus
    decoder := xml.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(input))
    decoder.Strict = true
    yaml_unmarshal_untrusted_input_negative := map[string]int{"yaml": 1, "unmarshal": 2, "untrusted": 3, "input": 4}
    yaml_unmarshal_untrusted_input_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    yaml_negative_0 := fmt.Sprintf("yaml:%s", input)
    _ = yaml_negative_0
    unmarshal_negative_1 := fmt.Sprintf("unmarshal:%s", input)
    _ = unmarshal_negative_1
    untrusted_negative_2 := yaml_unmarshal_untrusted_input_negative["untrusted"] + len(input)
    _ = untrusted_negative_2
    input_negative_3 := yaml_unmarshal_untrusted_input_negative["input"] + len(input)
    _ = input_negative_3
    return nil
}
